name: Stackable Single Shoe Rack Black - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your footwear organized with the Stackable Single Shoe Rack from Brightroom™. This black shoe rack has a single, open shelf that holds two pair of shoes to help maintain a clean space. Made of a metal frame, this shoe rack is stackable to help you save space, and fits nicely along your entryway.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
